ddls:
CREATE TABLE "scripts" (
  "script_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each script */,
  "script_name" TEXT /* Name of the script */,
  "script_type" TEXT /* Type of script (e.g., user management, server access) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the script */,
  "script_content" TEXT /* The actual content of the PowerShell script */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the script */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the script was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the script */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the script was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the script (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("script_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input variable */,
  "script_id" INTEGER /* ID of the script the variable belongs to */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the input variable */,
  "variable_value" TEXT /* Value of the input variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the input variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the input variable */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Whether the input variable is required */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the input variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_variables_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("script_id") REFERENCES scripts ("script_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "script_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each script type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the script type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the script type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "script_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each script execution */,
  "script_id" INTEGER /* ID of the script being executed */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date and time of script execution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of script execution (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "output" TEXT /* Output of script execution */,
  "executed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the script */,
  "execution_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the script execution in seconds */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the script execution failed */,
  "input_variables_json" TEXT /* JSON string containing the input variables used during execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_script_executions_executed_by FOREIGN KEY ("executed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_script_executions_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("script_id") REFERENCES scripts ("script_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "script_id" INTEGER /* ID of the script the permission is for */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("script_id") REFERENCES scripts ("script_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each script version */,
  "script_id" INTEGER /* ID of the script the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the script */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the script version was created */,
  "version_content" TEXT /* The actual content of the script version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("script_id") REFERENCES scripts ("script_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "script_id" INTEGER /* ID of the script the log entry is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log entry */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who triggered the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("script_id") REFERENCES scripts ("script_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "script_id" INTEGER /* ID of the script the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data for the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("script_id") REFERENCES scripts ("script_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "script_id" INTEGER /* ID of the script the notification is for */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message for the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Recipient of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("script_id") REFERENCES scripts ("script_id")
)
